playbook.intent: Client triggers a compliance audit (SOC 2, PCI DSS QSA, HIPAA, or banking-core) → vendor delivers gap analysis, remediated controls, evidence pack, owners, and audit-day runbook with zero steerco-escalating findings.
playbook.scope: Four-week sprint that runs in parallel to delivery. By end of week 4 the vendor side of the audit passes without any findings that escalate to the client steerco. Covers SOC 2 mid-cycle, PCI DSS QSA, HIPAA, or banking-core regulatory scopes. The vendor delivers gap analysis, remediated controls, evidence pack, named owners, and an audit-day runbook.

success-criteria.criterion: Current-state gap analysis covering all in-scope controls
Remediation plan with named owners and dates
Evidence pack mapped to control IDs

stage.name: Scope & control mapping
stage.intent: Lock the exact list of in-scope controls; nothing more, nothing less.

tasks.task: Read the regime catalogue with client compliance lead
Trace each vendor-owned control to its requirement source
Strategy-analysis: current vs future state per control family
Open a RACI for audit-day responsibilities

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after client compliance lead signs the vendor-side scope. Else loop back.

stage.name: Gap remediation - infra & secrets
stage.intent: Close the obvious infra gaps before evidence collection starts.

tasks.task: Network segmentation review (NSG rules, private link)
Backup + DR posture (DB backups, verification, RTO/RPO)
Rotate secrets; document the rotation
Pipe certificate lifecycle into CI/CD
Enforce mTLS where data crosses tenants

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the highest-severity infra gap is closed AND backup verification has at least one successful drill.

stage.name: Gap remediation - SDLC & supply chain
stage.intent: Make the build pipeline auditable end-to-end.

tasks.task: SAST + DAST results integrated into CI
Container scanning gating production deploys
Supply-chain attestations (SBOM, signatures)
Policy-as-code for environment promotion
Coding-agent compliance guardrails so AI-generated PRs are auditable

stage.decision-gate: Advance when CI gates production deploys on every required scan AND AI guardrails are merged.

stage.name: Evidence pack assembly
stage.intent: Collect, label, and version every artifact the auditor will ask for.

tasks.task: Map every control to ≥1 piece of evidence
Centralise API monitoring logging samples
Quality-management documentation for the in-scope work
PCI / HIPAA / banking-specific evidence checklist
Regulator-aware risk register update

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every in-scope control has ≥1 piece of evidence pinned, labelled, and accessible to the auditor.

stage.name: Audit-day & retro
stage.intent: Show up, answer cleanly, close findings, log the lessons.

tasks.task: Communications plan: who says what, in what channel
Run audit-day with RACI in hand
Capture findings and close them inside the agreed window
Status report to client steerco (no surprises)
Lessons-learned retro inside the vendor team

stage.decision-gate: Engagement-close criterion: zero findings escalated to steerco AND all minor findings closed inside the agreed window.

extra.value: [Client-side controls — vendor side only, Greenfield compliance program — assumes the regime is already in place, Legal interpretation — vendor coordinates with client legal]
[Compliance regime identified (SOC 2 / PCI / HIPAA / banking), Vendor scope of involvement signed off by client compliance lead, Existing monitoring + logging baseline in place]

[Treating SAST/DAST as ticked boxes — auditors read the findings AND the disposition, Ignoring AI-generated code; auditors increasingly ask about provenance, Skipping a dry-run audit — the real audit is the worst place to discover gaps]
['Could the auditor pull any control ID and find evidence in <2 minutes?', 'Did we attribute every AI-generated PR to a human reviewer?', 'Were findings discussed BEFORE steerco, not at?']

{human: faion get-content fintech-hipaa-compliance-audit-prep --format md, agent: faion get-content fintech-hipaa-compliance-audit-prep --format context, json: faion get-content fintech-hipaa-compliance-audit-prep --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, global angle'}]
